title: jacobinia gilliesii
intro: Jacobinia gilliesii, also known as the Jacobinia or Gilliesia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jacobinia gilliesii include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Jacobinia gilliesii can be prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves and roots, or as a tincture by steeping the plant material in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
